description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly blue with white trim and a black top. The front features a control panel with a red joystick, several colorful buttons, and a coin slot below, all situated beneath a large display screen framed by vibrant artwork. The marquee at the top displays the title 'Fix It Felix Jr.' in bold yellow letters on a blue background, accompanied by cartoon characters and playful graphics. Both side panels are decorated with large decals depicting the game's protagonist, Felix, holding a hammer, surrounded by red bricks and a cheerful color scheme. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF, with a hard, smooth finish and a slightly glossy appearance. Its overall design is inviting and nostalgic, making it a recognizable fixture in arcades, entertainment venues, or retro-themed urban spaces.
description: A blue and white upright arcade game cabinet with vibrant 'Fix It Felix Jr.' artwork, a control panel with joystick and buttons, and a coin slot. The sides feature large cartoon decals, and the top displays a colorful marquee.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a solid blue back panel framed by white side edges, with no visible controls or artwork.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the large 'Fix It Felix Jr.' decal featuring Felix and red bricks, set against a blue background.
description_view_2: The front view displays the control panel with a red joystick, multiple buttons, a coin slot, the main screen, and the colorful marquee at the top.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same large cartoon decal and blue panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved with a visible bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick on the left and three colored buttons to the right, arranged in a horizontal row, with additional artwork and markings on the panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Fix It Felix Jr.' title in yellow on a blue background, with cartoon characters and playful, colorful graphics matching the game's theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, colorful decals of Felix holding a hammer, surrounded by red bricks and a blue background, with the game title above.
